text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yay! I came in first! Woo-hooooo! Everyone in the
crowd looked so happy!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Didja see how loud the supermarket lady and the
parking lot security guard cheered when I won?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! I'm gonna get first again in the next race
too, for sure!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I wanna make everyone even happier!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I think so too! I've got a lot of things to
improve on!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna come in first next time too, no matter
what kind of race it is!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee! You can count on it!
